mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SYNC_DB_CONN WHERE STATUS = 1 ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYNC_DB_CONN(ID, NAME, DB_TYPE, HOST, PORT, DATABASE_NAME, JDBC_URL, USERNAME, PASSWORD, DRIVER_CLASS, SCHEMA, REMARK, STATUS, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES(#{id}, #{name}, #{dbType}, #{host}, #{port}, #{databaseName}, #{jdbcUrl}, #{username}, #{password}, #{driverClass}, #{schema}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE SYNC_DB_CONN SET NAME=#{name}, DB_TYPE=#{dbType}, HOST=#{host}, PORT=#{port}, DATABASE_NAME=#{databaseName}, JDBC_URL=#{jdbcUrl}, USERNAME=#{username}, PASSWORD=#{password}, DRIVER_CLASS=#{driverClass}, SCHEMA=#{schema}, REMARK=#{remark}, STATUS=#{status}, UPDATE_TIME=#{updateTime} WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE SYNC_DB_CONN SET STATUS = 0, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime} WHERE ID = #{id}
